artifactRefs.description: Focused command receipts and review evidence for compliance/export/retention API-package surfaces.

contractCoverage.obligation: Compliance checks cover shopping disclosure, price notice, source attribution, expression claims, content depth, high/medium/low export gating, and dismissal audit rules.
Export creates markdown, HTML, copy, and ZIP bundle records only after passing compliance and fresh draft checks, with manual-publish manifest fidelity.

contractCoverage.contractRef: G009 storage/audit metadata and migration reproducibility objective
contractCoverage.obligation: Export persistence stores draft/check/channel/storage key/bundle filename/byte size/checksum/manifest metadata and deterministic Prisma schema/migration coverage.
Retention cleanup supports conservative dry-run planning and explicit fail-closed execute behavior for exports, resolved errors, and cost logs.

surfaceEvidence.invocation: npm test -- tests/p3-contract.test.ts plus executor QA agent://64-G009ExecutorQaRerun
npm test -- tests/p3-contract.test.ts plus focused Biome/typecheck/Prisma validation
npm test -- tests/p3-contract.test.ts validates HTML escaping/styling and PK ZIP payload contents
npm test -- tests/p3-contract.test.ts validates dry-run, invalid mode, and invalid day-window behavior

surfaceEvidence.contractRef: Prisma schema and deterministic migration governance
surfaceEvidence.invocation: DATABASE_URL=... DIRECT_URL=... npx prisma validate and npx prisma generate

adversarialCases.scenario: High severity compliance issue is dismissed or replayed as allowed.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: High severity remains non-dismissible and export-blocking even with dismissal metadata.

adversarialCases.contractRef: P3-R2 medium dismissal audit and recalculation
adversarialCases.scenario: Medium severity issue without a reason or without recomputing sibling issue state attempts to unlock export.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Missing reason is rejected; valid dismissal stores dismissed_by/dismissed_at/dismiss_reason and recomputes the returned compliance_check export_allowed state.

adversarialCases.scenario: Export uses a passing check for a different or stale draft.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Export returns blocked unless latest check allows export, issue-level readiness passes, draft id matches, and check timestamp is fresh for the draft.

adversarialCases.scenario: Malformed JSON or unknown request fields reach the mutating export path.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Route returns VALIDATION_ERROR before calling exportContentPackage.

adversarialCases.scenario: ZIP regresses to a JSON envelope or HTML preserves executable script content/lacks styling.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: ZIP content is a PK ZIP archive containing post.md/post.html/post.txt/export_manifest.json, and HTML output escapes script text and includes style.

adversarialCases.scenario: Export metadata exists only in response or checksum/byte size does not reflect actual bundle bytes.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Persisted export records include draft/check/channel/storage key/bundle filename/manifest plus byte size and SHA-256 derived from actual text or ZIP bytes.

adversarialCases.scenario: Unknown cleanup mode or zero-day retention window falls through to destructive deleteMany.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Cleanup planning rejects unsupported modes and non-positive/non-integer day windows before DB work; deletion requires explicit execute mode.

iteration.evidence: AI SLOP CLEANUP REPORTS reran cleanly after fixes: compliance cleanup agent://55-G009CleanupCompliance had zero blocking findings; export cleanup rerun agent://61-G009CleanupExportRerun returned CLEAR/APPROVE with no blocking or advisory findings; persistence cleanup rerun agent://62-G009CleanupPersistenceRerun returned CLEAR with no blocking findings and its only advisory migration-field assertion was subsequently added. Final full rerun commands passed: focused Biome artifact://611, npm test P3 artifact://613 with 29 tests, typecheck artifact://615, Prisma validate, and Prisma generate artifact://618. Architect and executor QA lanes are clean with empty blockers.
